SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONG, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY $2,183.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,328.00, SEE ENCLOSED ATTACHMENT: STATEMENT OF DECISION.
